publicRemarks: Short-term rentals are allowed in Palm Desert Resort Country Club, making this ground-level 1BD/1BA condo a flexible desert escape for personal use, seasonal enjoyment or rental potential. Light, bright and move-in ready, the home features a remodeled kitchen with crisp white cabinetry, slab counters, stainless steel appliances, generous storage, a breakfast bar and an open connection to the living and dining areas. A vaulted ceiling in the main living area, recessed lighting, plantation shutters, wood-look tile flooring and neutral finishes create a clean, airy, updated feel throughout. The living room opens through sliding glass doors to a private-feeling covered greenbelt patio with pergola shade, lounge space and peaceful views for easy indoor-outdoor living. The spacious bedroom also opens toward the patio/greenbelt and includes a ceiling fan, plantation shutters and a large walk-in closet. The updated bath offers a tiled walk-in shower, modern vanity and bright finishes. Offered furnished for convenience. Palm Desert Resort Country Club is a gated community known for resort-style amenities including 20 pools/spas, tennis, pickleball, bocce, clubhouse, restaurant/bar and golf. Near Indian Wells Tennis Garden, Acrisure Arena, El Paseo, dining and freeway access.

Location, lifestyle, and mountain views come together in this beautifully maintained single level residence just moments from world renowned El Paseo. Ideally situated in the heart of South Palm Desert, this inviting home offers stunning mountain views from the living room, and welcoming patio, creating the perfect backdrop for enjoying spectacular desert sunrises and colorful evening skies. One of the home's most desirable features is its prime location adjacent to the community pool, providing the feel of a private resort style retreat without the maintenance. Inside, the thoughtfully designed floor plan features two generously sized bedrooms, soaring vaulted ceilings, abundant natural light, and tile flooring throughout, for easy maintenance and comfortable desert living. The spacious living area is anchored by large sliding glass doors that beautifully frame the surrounding mountain views, seamlessly connecting indoor and outdoor spaces. The kitchen and dining areas flow effortlessly into the living room, creating an inviting atmosphere for everyday living and entertaining alike. An indoor laundry area adds convenience, while the well proportioned bedrooms provide comfortable accommodations for residents and guests. Step outside to a peaceful backyard retreat featuring a lush grassy area and plenty of space to relax, dine outdoors, or enjoy Palm Desert's year round sunshine

publicRemarks: Back on the market at No fault of the property or seller. Owner Occupied. Comfortable, Low Maintenance Desert living at Domani 55+ Resort Style community. This 3 Bedrooms, 3 ½ Bath, 2 car Garage offers a great mix of style and practicality. Imperial Irrigation District (IID) means Lower electric cost. A standout feature is the Guest Suite with its own private entrance to the backyard giving visitors extra privacy. Home features open floor plan with vaulted ceilings and a bright, airy feel. Granite countertops in the kitchen with ample sleek cabinetry as well as a pantry. Formal dining area opens to the patio through oversized sliding doors inviting seamless indoor-outdoor flow. Tile floors throughout the main living area while laminate in the bedrooms. Primary suite is spacious, with a walk in closet and well-appointed bathroom with walk in shower. Each bedroom has its own en-suite bathroom for privacy. Separate laundry room. Landscaping by Tessera creates a welcoming courtyard with pavers and tranquil fountain. Low HOA includes Resort style pool & spa, pickleball and Bocce ball courts, full gym, Conference room, clubhouse, and a gated dog park. Ideally located near shopping, dining, and entertainment. Also, within easy reach of golf courses, Tennis courts, and hiking trails, this home offers the best of desert living in one of Palm Desert's premier 55+ communities.

Stunning remodeled South Palm Desert 3-bedroom, 2-bath condo situated near golf courses and surrounded by breathtaking mountains. This spacious home features OWNED SOLAR, a gas fireplace, wood cabinetry throughout, granite and travertine countertops, stainless steel appliances, tankless water heater, custom shutters, solatubes, skylights, a wet bar with sink, separate laundry room with sink, master en-suite bathroom with step down shower, 2 car attached garage and a private patio to enjoy the mountain views, TV entertainment and a barbecue. The fully equipped kitchen boasts electric stainless steel appliances, including a range/oven, refrigerator, microwave and dishwasher. The gated community offers amenities such as 4 pools, a clubhouse and tennis/pickleball courts. This beautiful property is located just a short drive from El Paseo (for easy access to shopping, dining, and entertainment), the Living Desert Zoo and Gardens, the Art Smith Trailhead and the Indian Canyons offering unparalleled outdoor adventures.

Welcome to Your Secure Sanctuary on Rose Dawn! From the moment you arrive at 79335 Rose Dawn, you will feel an immediate sense of peace, warmth, and belonging. publicRemarks: Turnkey stand-alone home fully furnished & with cash purchase, your own Mini Cooper Convertible for top down desert fun. Currently with extra large spa BUT Custom Pool Design completed and HOA APPROVED. Call for details. You buy it, specify your pool finishes and have it done by August 15th. This stand-alone home has no attached neighbors. And although a 3-bedroom, it includes an additional large office space. Full Miele kitchen with 2-dishwashers, wall mounted espresso machine, induction cooktop, convection oven and steam oven. Custom bar for entertaining and open floor plan. With custom stone, ice maker, insta-hot faucet and lux barstools. Open plan gives light and sight lines of mountain views and Sunnylands-style desert landscaping. Leased solar, skylights and on-demand hot water all add to energy efficiency. Along with the 3-ensuite bedrooms, you'll see a lovely office space with garden featuring a fountain. Design continuity throughout. High quality, thoughtful materials. Statement fireplace and dining area to enjoy the views while the sun sets. 2-car attached garage, golf cart garage and built-in storage. A mix of mid century, 70s glam, and modern feel add to the fun spirit of desert life. Collectible mid century pieces, Natuzi sectional, custom bar stools and amazing Jonathan Entler Chandelier dining table and more.

Beautifully appointed throughout, the residence showcases soaring white vaulted ceilings, custom textured walls, exquisite built-in cabinetry, and an abundance of natural light that enhances its sophisticated architectural design. Owned solar provides exceptional energy efficiency, while the spacious two-car and golf cart garage is equipped with a 220-volt EV charging outlet, seamlessly blending luxury with today's modern conveniences. Perfectly positioned on one of the community's largest private lots, this exceptional property captures sweeping panoramic views and offers an unparalleled indoor-outdoor lifestyle. The expansive outdoor living spaces feature a built-in BBQ entertaining area and direct access to one of the community's 46 pools and spas, creating the ultimate setting for enjoying the desert's year-round sunshine. publicRemarks: Reintroduced at $1,599,000 -- one of the best opportunities for a fully reimagined home in The Springs. This exceptional move-in ready residence offers a larger footprint than most, modern finishes, and effortless desert living with no projects required. Abundant natural light, seamless indoor-outdoor flow, and stunning views create an elevated lifestyle experience. Redesigned well beyond cosmetic updates, the home features level-5 smooth walls, imported flooring, textured designer tile, and a refined, spa-like feel throughout. The chef's kitchen anchors the living spaces with an oversized Taj Mahal stone waterfall island, full-slab backsplash, and premium Thermador and JennAir appliances. Designed for entertaining, it opens easily to the dining area with custom cabinetry and a floating sideboard. A concealed floor-to-ceiling bookcase reveals a walk-in pantry. All three bedrooms include walk-in closets with built-ins and ensuite baths finished in cohesive imported tile. Additional upgrades include motorized shades, upgraded plumbing and electrical, a whole-home LifeSource water filtration system, mini-split AC in garage with abundant storage. Large front courtyard has room for a spool if that is amenity you want to consider. Welcome to resort-style living in the heart of Palm Springs. Perfectly positioned in one of the community's most desirable locations, this ground-floor residence enjoys a peaceful interior setting with no road noise, offering a quiet retreat just moments from everything Palm Springs has to offer. The bright and inviting floor plan features stone flooring, in-unit laundry, a private patio, and direct access to the sparkling community pool. Recent upgrades include a brand-new central air conditioning system, providing comfort and efficiency year-round. Located in central Palm Springs, you're minutes from downtown dining, shopping, entertainment, and the city's iconic mid-century modern architecture. Whether you're seeking a full-time residence, weekend getaway, or investment opportunity, this low-maintenance desert escape delivers the best of Palm Springs living.

SUCCESSFUL SHORT TERM VACATION RENTAL just blocks from downtown Palm Springs dining, shopping, and entertainment. Located within the gated Biarritz community, this top floor 1 bedroom, 1 bath residence is offered turnkey furnished and is already proven as an income producing property. Ideal as a short term rental, longer term investment, weekend retreat, or full time residence. Dual balconies deliver a mix of pool and mountain views, adding strong guest appeal and indoor outdoor living. The open living, dining, and kitchen layout with pass through design maximizes usability and rental functionality. The spacious ensuite primary bath has been tastefully updated. Biarritz amenities include a large swimming pool, two spas, two tennis courts, secured bike storage, laundry rooms, and assigned covered parking. Prime location moments from the core of downtown Palm Springs, a consistent driver of rental demand. Low HOA fee supports strong net potential. Land Lease is currently $126.63/mo and expires in 2046.

Beautifully renovated ground-level condo at 5300 E. Waverly Dr. #M4104 in Palm Springs, located in the Palm Springs Golf & Tennis Club with no land lease. This recently renovated move-in ready residence features terrazzo tile flooring throughout, LED recessed lighting, and a bright open-concept layout. The updated kitchen offers custom made walnut cabinetry, quartz countertops with waterfall edges, and Samsung smart appliances. The bathroom includes a custom tile shower with glass enclosure. Community amenities include pools, spas, tennis courts, and well-maintained grounds. HOA covers common area maintenance and community amenities. Furnished sale may be available!

publicRemarks: Welcome to Villas De Las Flores, where resort-style living meets the ultimate South Palm Springs lifestyle. This stylish 2-bedroom, 2-bath condo offers a rare opportunity to enjoy both comfort and low-maintenance living in one of the desert's most desirable locations. Thoughtfully updated, the residence features quartz counters, stainless steel appliances, and a light-filled interior designed for effortless comfort. Step outside to your own private patio and take in beautiful western mountain views while overlooking the sparkling community pool--perfect for morning coffee or evening relaxation. The seamless indoor-outdoor flow enhances the desert lifestyle, making entertaining or quiet retreat equally enjoyable. Villas De Las Flores residents enjoy an array of amenities, including 11 pools, 2 spas, 2 tennis courts, 8 pickleball courts, a fitness room, and a shared library. With low monthly HOA dues of $520, this community provides both value and convenience. HOA's include water, trash, and earthquake insurance. Fantastic South Palm Springs location places you just minutes from shopping, dining, golf, hiking trails, and the vibrant downtown scene. Best of all, this condo sits on fee simple land--you own the land, adding long-term value and peace of mind.

publicRemarks: Desirable resort style living within a short distance to the heart of Downtown Palm Springs. This contemporary, multi-level, 1,923 sq ft, 3BR, 3BA townhome is ready to move in. The living area features a private balcony with mountain views, high ceilings with Art lighting, fireplace and convenient wet bar. The kitchen has been updated with sleek Norcraft cabinetry and newer appliances including an LG Refrigerator and KitchenAid Oven/Microwave. Adjacent is the dining area with direct access to a private patio perfect for grilling and fresco dining. Two bedrooms on the upper level includes a spacious Primary Retreat and sitting area with a picture window overlooking lush greenery. Dual sinks, a tiled shower and tub and large walk-in closet completes the space. The third bedroom on the main level could be used as a home office/den. There is direct access to the 2 car garage. This interior corner location offers modern elegance within a convenient setting to enjoy the Clubhouse, fitness, tennis, pickleball, racquetball and 8 pools, spas and community greenspace.

Front yard pool and spa welcome you to this 3BR/2BA home in Palm Springs' Warm Sands/Sunny Dunes neighborhood, featuring a screened front patio, fireplace in the living room, attached garage and 1976 midcentury feel ready for its next chapter. Some interior photos have been virtually staged to illustrate potential furniture placement; no physical staging is currently in place.

Experience quintessential Palm Springs living in this beautifully updated midcentury modern home in the highly desirable Racquet Club Estates neighborhood. Blending iconic architectural character with fresh, playful design, the home features charming pink accents that perfectly capture the vibrant spirit of the desert. Offered turnkey furnished, this stylish residence is ready to be enjoyed from day one, whether as a full time home, weekend escape, or investment opportunity. An open concept floor plan, polished concrete floors, and expansive walls of glass create bright, inviting living spaces that seamlessly flow to the outdoors. Situated on a generously sized, ultra private lot enveloped by a mature ficus hedge, the backyard is a true desert retreat complete with a sparkling pool, expansive patio areas, breathtaking mountain views, and ample space to relax, entertain, or simply soak in the Palm Springs sunshine. Thoughtfully upgraded with an owned solar system and a tankless water heater, this home offers modern efficiency without compromising its timeless appeal. Ideally located just minutes from downtown Palm Springs, acclaimed dining, shopping, golf, and entertainment, this exceptional property embodies the effortless style and relaxed luxury of desert living.

Bifold doors in the living room and primary bedroom invite the unique allure of Palm Springs living right inside. The kitchen is modern but elegant with complete with state of the art appliances and equipped with everything you need to make the perfect meal. The bifold window opens up to a bar top outside, setting the stage for true Southern California living. Priced to SELL ! Looking for a first floor primary suite ? Here it is ! Situated on a desirable premium corner lot in the highly sought-after Vibe community, this light-filled three-bedroom, three bathroom home offers an exceptional location with enhanced privacy and mountain views. This home was highly upgraded with builder options which set it apart from others in the community. The open concept layout showcases a beautiful kitchen with quartz countertops and stainless steel appliances, high living room ceilings. Fully retractable tri-fold doors create indoor-outdoor living, that open to the private spool (spa-pool), built-in BBQ, and wrap around yard with multiple entertaining spaces and two pet runs. The main level features a primary suite with a grand bathroom and a large walk-in closet, along with a third guest bedroom, and hall bath and laundry room. Upstairs, a loft overlooks the living area and opens to a private balcony complete with a firepit, and mountain views. A second ensuite bedroom on this level offers a private retreat for guest. Additional upgrades include 14 owned solar panels, a water filtration system, an electric vehicle charging setup, epoxy garage floors, in a two-car garage. At the Vibe enjoy amenities including 2 dog parks, bocce ball courts, EV charger and 'The Cove' a social space.

Situated on fee land that you own, the home is characterized by soaring ceilings, an open-concept floor plan, and dramatic walls of glass that showcase a south-facing pool framed by breathtaking mountain views. The formal living and dining areas balance sophistication with comfort, anchored by a magnificent rock gas fireplace and filled with natural light. Seamless indoor-outdoor flow creates an ideal setting for both everyday living and effortless entertaining. A central bar serves as both a gathering space and an elegant serving station, connecting flawlessly to the spacious modern kitchen. Thoughtfully designed, the kitchen features a complete suite of stainless steel appliances, generous prep space, an oversized island, and extends effortlessly to a private patio. Envisioned as a private sanctuary, the expansive primary suite offers direct access to the outdoors and a spa-inspired bath featuring dual vanities and an oversized walk-in shower. Welcome to your very own paradise in beautiful Indian Wells! This second floor studio condo features a large private covered patio, stunning mountain views, an office work station (which could be converted to a laundry room), generous bath, cozy kitchen, an extended walk-in closet w/ built-ins, well thought-out custom architectural features including cathedral ceilings, a storage loft, and ensconced lighting. The recent installation of a NEW HVAC system brings added value to this clear winner. Uniquely positioned at the end of a quiet cul de sac, the home is effortlessly close to one of three heated community pools. The well curated community of Mountain Cove sits behind a guarded gate just off Highway 111. It's conveniently located near everything Indian Wells & La Quinta have to offer including shopping, restaurants, Old Town, the Tennis Gardens, Coachella & Stagecoach Music Festivals, and more! You and your guests will appreciate the handy community EV charging station as well, not far from the unit. Relaxed rental guidelines allow for short term rentals with just a 7 day minimum. Pets are also welcome, with some restrictions (two pets, 50 lbs each). The low monthly HOA fee of only $264 includes water, trash, community amenities, including use of the gym at the local Hyatt Regency, local golf & restaurant discounts and more. publicRemarks: Located on a quiet cul-de-sac in the desirable Colony Cove community, this fully renovated and fully furnished home sits on a large 0.31-acre lot and offers easy, comfortable desert living. The home has been updated throughout with new flooring, fresh paint, upgraded windows, LED lighting, and a custom entertainment center with surround sound. The kitchen features new cabinets, countertops, and ZLINE appliances, and opens nicely to the main living space. The backyard is set up perfectly for entertaining with a Pebble Tec pool and spa, covered patio, and outdoor BBQ area with two 65” TVs—great for hosting or just relaxing outside. Additional upgrades include remodeled bathrooms, epoxy garage floors, and new garage doors. Offered fully furnished and move-in ready, all in a great Indian Wells location close to golf, dining, and resorts.

Stunning South-facing Mountain Views highlight this beautifully updated 4-bedroom home, thoughtfully designed and built by renowned developer Philip Manuel. Showcasing quality craftsmanship and timeless design, this exceptional home offers both elegance and comfort in every detail, with upgraded tile flooring and a spacious Living Room featuring a fireplace and multi-slide doors for seamless indoor-outdoor living. The updated Chef's Kitchen features crisp white cabinetry, stainless steel appliances, and a functional layout ideal for both everyday living and entertaining. Updated bathrooms, modern finishes and stylish fixtures. The spacious Primary Suite is a private retreat featuring a spa-inspired bath, walk-in closet, and multi-slide doors that open directly to the Pool and stunning Mountain views. 3 Guest Bedrooms feature en-suite baths providing comfort and privacy and private patios. Step out to the back patio and enjoy beautiful desert evenings by the Pool and Spa surrounded by breathtaking vistas. A 2 car garage plus a dedicated golf cart garage. A rare opportunity to own a meticulously updated home with sought-after southern exposure and spectacular views in prestigious Indian Wells.
